examples: Wintery holidays often fill us with joy.
That was until Elsa came into our lives one very cold, wet, and wintery day.
It's finally cold and wintery and almost everyone I know has a cold of some kind.
The ride has a sense of authority that made it lithe but solid in wintery conditions.
Wet and wintery weather has caused a rise in landslips in Jersey, according to the transport department.
